game_info.core_gameplay: Touch-drawing line defense puzzle. Core loop: draw protective barriers on screen to shield a dog character from attacking bees/wasps for 10 seconds per level. Efficiency mechanic: use less ink (shorte
game_info.core_usp: True underdog fantasy with charming dog characters like husky, Oliver, and boudin, creating emotional engagement.
game_info.target_persona: Casual puzzle players seeking quick, engaging sessions with emotional appeal. Motivated by cute characters, underdog narratives, and light strategy. Genre-literate in defense/puzzle games, sensitive to monetization likely through ads or in-app purchases for power-ups. Prefers family-friendly content
game_info.value_hooks:
- Strategic defense against bee and wasp swarms with line-drawing mechanics, requiring tactical planning.
- Quick play rescue time sessions designed for short, engaging gameplay bursts.
- Efficiency challenge: use less ink to get higher ratings, adding a skill-based optimization layer.
- Multiple rescue missions with increasing difficulty and beehive destruction levels, offering progression and variety.

script.visual: Close-up on a cute husky dog (Oliver) looking scared, with bees swarming in background. High-contrast lighting, vibrant colors.
script.audio_content: Save this dog from the bees! Just draw a line!
script.audio_meaning: 救这只狗免受蜜蜂攻击！只需画一条线！

script.visual: Hand cursor appears, draws a strong, thick line around the dog, protecting it. Bees bounce off. Dog smiles.
New scene: same dog, but player hand hesitates, moves toward drawing a good line, then at last second draws a weak, wobbly line.
script.audio_content: But what if you mess up?

script.visual: Line collapses dramatically, bees attack, dog cries with exaggerated tears. Negative numbers pop up ('-100 Ink').
Reaction face-cam of a micro-influencer looking shocked and laughing (UGC style).
Quick montage: player draws efficient lines, uses less ink, gets 'A+' rating. Multiple dogs (husky, boudin) rescued in different levels.
script.audio_content: Can you do better? Save them all with less ink!
script.audio_meaning: 你能做得更好吗？用更少的墨水拯救所有狗狗！
script.text_meaning: 效率挑战：使用更少的墨水

script.visual: Choice-based UI: two options appear—'Save Now' (big button) vs. 'Watch Ad' (small button). Hand clicks 'Save Now'.
Final shot: all dogs smiling together, underdog story complete (from danger to safety). App icon and download CTA.
script.audio_content: Download Save the Doge now and prove your skills!
script.audio_meaning: 立即下载《拯救狗狗》，证明你的技巧！

script.visual: [UGC-style shaky vertical video. Close-up on cute husky dog (Oliver) looking scared. Bees swarm in fast from top with loud BUZZ sound. Screen vibrates slightly.]
[Jump cut. Hand enters frame with finger ready to draw. Simple straight line path from bees to dog is highlighted with glowing effect. Text overlay: 'DRAW A LINE TO SAVE HIM' centered at Y:40%.]
script.audio_content: 画一条线就能救他，超简单对吧？
script.audio_meaning: Draw a line to save him, super easy right?
script.text_content: JUST DRAW A LINE. SO EASY.
script.text_meaning: Just draw a line. So easy.

script.visual: [Jump cut. Hand hesitates, then draws a useless circle around the dog instead of a line. Dynamic zoom on the circle as it's drawn. Bees bypass it easily.]
[Jump cut. Slow-motion: bees sting the dog. Dog cries with exaggerated tears. 'NEGATIVE -100' pops up in red. Fake 'INK LOW' notification banner appears briefly at top.]
script.audio_meaning: Oh no! All wrong! The dog is crying!

script.visual: [Jump cut. Text overlay: 'WHY?' centered at Y:50%, then switches to 'I bet you can't save him'. Quick montage of other dogs (boudin) in similar peril with hand drawing fails.]
script.audio_content: 为什么这么笨？我打赌你也救不了他。
script.audio_meaning: Why so stupid? I bet you can't save him either.
script.text_content: WHY? I BET YOU CAN'T SAVE HIM.
script.text_meaning: Why? I bet you can't save him.

script.visual: [Jump cut. Screen splits: Option A shows hand drawing correct line (dog saved with happy face), Option B shows another fail (dog crying). Fake choice UI with 'A or B?' overlay.]
script.audio_content: 选A还是选B？只有1%的人能到第10关！
script.audio_meaning: Choose A or B? Only 1% reach Level 10!
script.text_content: A OR B? ONLY 1% REACH LEVEL 10!
script.text_meaning: A or B? Only 1% reach Level 10!

script.visual: [Jump cut. Quick success flash: hand draws efficient short line, dog is protected, bees bounce off. 'PERFECT SAVE +100' pops up. Game logo 'Save the Doge' appears with download CTA button.]
script.audio_content: 来试试看，你能救多少只狗狗？
script.audio_meaning: Come try it, how many dogs can you save?
script.text_content: CAN YOU SAVE THE DOGE? DOWNLOAD NOW!
script.text_meaning: Can you save the doge? Download now!
